overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban downtown. The player moves from a covered sidewalk beneath towering buildings with digital billboards into an open pedestrian plaza with trees, eventually approaching a group doing synchronized exercises near a staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway structure, passing illuminated digital billboards

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail track creating covered walkway below with concrete pillars
large illuminated advertisement for All Foods displaying a burger with Buy 2 Get 1 Free text
yellow and black striped construction barriers lining the edge of the road
row of palm trees visible in the distance along the street

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure in a futuristic city, with digital billboards for All Foods visible on the left and construction barriers separating the walkway from the road on the right. The area is shaded by the overpass above, with sparse pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with digital advertising

events.description: exits covered walkway beneath overpass into open sunlit plaza area
emerges from shadow of overpass into bright direct sunlight
pedestrian with mohawk and plaid shirt passes very close to camera on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza passing by a large Free Cirrus advertisement billboard

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive mohawk and yellow plaid shirt walking past camera

entered.detail: tall vertical advertisement billboard featuring Free Cirrus cola with cartoon gorilla character holding a gun
wide open pedestrian area with tiled flooring and scattered benches

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a bright open plaza, the scene transitions from shadow to direct sunlight. A prominent Free Cirrus billboard stands on the left while the camera passes close to a pedestrian with a mohawk. The environment opens up with full sky visibility and paved tile ground.

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza with increasing tree cover, approaching a group of people exercising in the distance

entered.detail: mature trees with dense green canopies providing shade in the plaza
wide concrete stairs with red trim leading up to a higher pedestrian level
rectangular concrete planters containing small trees and shrubs

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the plaza, the environment becomes more vegetated with large trees and planter boxes. The camera approaches a wide concrete staircase in the distance while moving past benches and digital billboards. The ground remains paved tiles with moderate tree cover providing partial shade.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza exercise area with concrete stairs

events.description: slows down to observe group performing synchronized exercises
begins ascending concrete stairs toward upper level

agents.ego_description: stopping to watch a group doing synchronized tai chi exercises, then moving toward and ascending the concrete stairs

notable_agents.action: group of six people performing synchronized tai chi or stretching exercises in the plaza

entered.detail: two individuals resting and sitting on the concrete steps

segments.scene_description: Approaching a group of NPCs performing synchronized tai chi exercises in the shaded plaza area. The camera slows to observe the group before moving toward a wide concrete staircase. Two people are sitting on the steps as the camera begins to ascend, with large trees and futuristic buildings framing the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a shaded urban underpass into a bright, vegetated pedestrian plaza. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway structure, passing All Foods digital billboards and construction barriers in the dim light of the overpass. As the camera emerges from the cover, the scene transitions abruptly from shadow to direct sunlight, opening up into a wide tiled plaza featuring a Free Cirrus billboard and passing pedestrians. The environment then becomes more lush as the camera moves past large trees and planter boxes, shifting from the open sun into dappled shade. Finally, the movement slows to observe a group performing synchronized tai chi exercises before turning toward a wide concrete staircase where people sit beneath the framing of futuristic buildings.
